content.en:
A sea of ruins.

Ye Tian came here and went straight to the magic circle.

After a while, Ye Tian arrived in front of the magic circle.

"Dongyun Great Ancestor is too weak, it's just a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that has been tempered twice by his whole body, he was chased and killed by a group of immeasurable ruin monsters, but he still has time to break into this magic circle, this is not normal!"

Ye Tian guessed that the Remnant Heaven Pavilion had already studied this magic circle, and there was a way to enter, not to escape in a hurry.

The Remnant Heaven Pavilion concealed this from him, but he was not angry.

However, he was a little curious about the circle, so he came to take a look.

"This magic circle is a bit complicated, if you want to get in, it's really a bit troublesome!"

Ye Tian didn't want to waste time, and was ready to try it with all his strength to see if he could break the magic circle and enter it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian urged the Taihao Infinite Body, and the Taihao Infinite Body of the Consummation Realm combined with the sword made by the immeasurable supernatural power seed imprint, stabbed towards the magic circle.

The power of this sword had already reached his peak, and it was comparable to the full force of a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

Burst!

The circle was pierced by a sword and torn apart.

Ye Tian stepped directly into it, entered the inside of the magic circle, and went straight into the depths of the magic circle.

And this is the area where the Remnant Heaven Pavilion Dongyun Great Ancestor has not come, but Ye Tian has come in.

"Broken!"

"Broken!"

Ye Tian shot with all his strength, slashed through the layers of barriers of the magic circle, and finally entered the core of the magic circle.

At the heart of the circle was a fragment of the earth, as well as a few shattered buildings.

Ye Tian sensed it, there was nothing in these buildings, but there was a vein found in the depths of the earth.

Rumble!

The earth was torn apart by Ye Tian, and a piece of gray metal was grabbed out by Ye Tian.

"It's ......"

After Ye Tian's identification, he was shocked.

"Heavenly Realm Gold!"

This is an unimaginably precious material, even if it is a palm-sized piece of Heavenly Realm Gold, its value is unimaginable.

The immeasurable blood gold stone is far inferior to this Heavenly Realm gold, and its value is enough to compare to a god's blood.

The value of Tongtian Realm Gold is used to craft weapons, such as the Escape Shuttle that Ye Tian exchanged from Yinheng Tianzu, one of the main materials of which is Tongtian Realm Gold.

Many weapons crafted by fifth-level high-level immeasurable lifeforms require Heavenly Realm Gold, which is why Heavenly Realm Gold is very popular.

"This should be the territory of a powerful force in the Broken Ruins Realm, after the Broken Ruins Realm was broken, this sea of broken ruins was formed in the immeasurable ruins, but this place has been preserved! The Remnant Heaven Pavilion shouldn't know either, otherwise they would have taken these Heavenly Realm Gold away a long time ago!"

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't leave this Tongtian Realm gold vein behind, he directly began to dig this vein.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian went directly into this Tongtian Realm gold vein and excavated one piece after another of Tongtian Realm gold.

The Tongtian Realm gold vein was very strong, but Ye Tian's strength was also strong enough, so he excavated pieces of Tongtian Realm gold little by little.

One hundred!

Two hundred!

Three hundred!

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually unearthed more Tongtian Realm gold.

After a long time, this Tongtian Realm gold vein was almost excavated by Ye Tian.

"More than 5,000 yuan of gold from the Heavenly Realm, this time I made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that this time he just saved the Dongyun Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and by the way, he would have such a harvest by investigating this magic circle.

His luck was undoubtedly good!

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed a different aura.

"It seems that other treasures have been bred in the gold veins of the Heavenly Realm!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and directly penetrated several pieces of Tongtian Realm gold, shattering an area and grabbing out a piece of gray-gold metal.

And as soon as he grabbed this piece of metal, the immeasurable bones in his whole body were shaking, as if he couldn't withstand the energy of this piece of metal.

Immediately, he sealed the piece of metal layer by layer, and then he firmly grasped it.

"Isn't this true gold?"

Ye Tian thought that it was this treasure, and his pupils suddenly shrank.

Because, he had seen Tongtian True Gold in the list of treasures given by Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, and only a few Tongtian Realm gold veins had a 1 in 10,000 chance of being born.

Compared with Tongtian Zhenjin, Tongtian Jinjin is spicy chicken.

Tongtian Realm Gold is useful for the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it is useless for the Heavenly Ancestors, but Tongtian True Gold is useful!

In that list, the value of a piece of Heavenly Realm Gold was 150,000 contribution points, and those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms couldn't be exchanged, so they just put it on it and looked at it.

There are many uses for Tongtian True Gold, for example, it can be refined into weapons, but it is more wasteful to use it to refine weapons.

The greatest use of Tongtian Zhenjin is to integrate into the immeasurable bone, so that the immeasurable bone can absorb the immeasurable gold, so that the immeasurable bone can metamorphose, surpass the limit, and achieve super-immeasurable bone.

Whether it's immeasurable bones or immeasurable blood, the ultimate limit is the real limit, and no matter how much you cultivate, it's impossible to break it.

But through the innocent gold is so against the sky, forcibly breaking the limit, and achieving super-class.

However, a piece of Tongtian Zhenjin can only make a piece of immeasurable bone break the limit, and three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones in the whole body are enough to require three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Tongtian Zhenjin!

Even if it was a Heavenly Ancestor, I am afraid that there are not a few pieces of Tongtian Realm Gold, and it is very difficult to gather three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Tongtian Realm Gold.

And if you want to break the limit of the immeasurable bone, you must become a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, once you reach the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, the flesh and blood body will be completely finalized, and there is no way to let your immeasurable bone metamorphose even if you have the innocent gold.

In addition, if you want to use Tongtian True Gold, the premise is that all your immeasurable bones have reached the limit, otherwise you can't use Tongtian True Gold.

And Ye Tian met all the conditions, if he had three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Heavenly True Gold, then he could make the immeasurable bones of his whole body reach the super-rank.

"If it were other Great Ancestors, I was afraid that I would really not be able to gather so much Innocent Gold, but I can!"

He picked up two pieces of Tongtian Realm Gold and used the ability to fuse all things with the ability to copy his talent to fuse the two pieces of Tongtian Realm Gold.

As time slowly passed, one piece after another of the Tongtian Realm Gold was fused by Ye Tian, and nine pieces of Tongtian Realm Gold were fused all the way, and finally a piece of Tongtian True Gold was fused.

"Succeeded, so that I can get together the innocent gold!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Next, he fused all the Heavenly Realm Gold into Heavenly True Gold, and then prepared to use these Heavenly True Wealth to enter the immeasurable bones of the whole body, so as to transform the immeasurable bones of the whole body.
